commands.review_summary:
The PR adds TUI handling for Gateway session.message events, queues/coalesces active-session history reloads, and covers the new behavior in TUI handler tests.

PR surface: Source +122, Tests +266. Total +388 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main subscribes the TUI to session events but ignores the Gateway session.message event that carries displayable transcript updates. I did not run a live terminal reproduction in this read-only review.
